phrases.english: Believe in yourself, you can do it.
You're a true friend, always there.
I miss our talks, a lot.
Good things, come to those who wait.
phrases.indonesian: Hal baik, datang pada yang sabar.
phrases.transliteration: Hal baiik, daatang pada yang sabar.

phrases.english: Slow and steady, wins the race.

phrases.indonesian: Pikir di luar, bangun di dalam.
phrases.transliteration: Pi-kir di lu-ar, ba-ngun di da-lam.

phrases.english: Past is past, let it go.
Learn a little, grow a lot.
Embrace the challenge, you will win.

phrases.indonesian: Dengar lebih banyak, bicara lebih baik.
phrases.transliteration: Dengar lebih banyak, bicara lebih baik.

phrases.english: I want to buy this one.

phrases.indonesian: Dengar lebih banyak, bicara lebih sedikit.
phrases.transliteration: Deh-ngar leh-bikh bah-nyak, bee-chah-rah leh-bikh se-dee-kit.

phrases.indonesian: Belajar Bahasa Indonesia, bicara percaya diri.
phrases.transliteration: Belajar Bahasa Indonesia, bicara percaya diri.

phrases.english: Discover new cultures, connect with people.
phrases.indonesian: Temukan budaya baru, terhubung dengan orang.
phrases.transliteration: Temukan budaya baru, terhubung dengan orang.

phrases.english: Understand the language, feel the spirit.
Breathe in calm, breathe out stress.
Find your center, be present now.
Let go of worries, embrace peace.
I want to go, to the beach.
You are stronger than you think.
A little hope, goes a long way.
Embrace the challenge, find your strength.
A little more, and we're there.

phrases.indonesian: Waktu yang baik, dengan orang baik.
phrases.transliteration: Wakh-too yahng bah-eek, deh-nghan oh-rahng bah-eek.

phrases.english: The path is long, but you are strong.
phrases.swahili: Njia ni ndefu, lakini wewe ni hodari.
phrases.transliteration: NJI-a ni NDE-fu, la-KI-ni WE-we ni ho-DA-ri

phrases.english: Focus your mind, embrace the challenge.
The sun shines brightly, doesn't it?
Face the unknown, with a smile.

phrases.swahili: Inuka juu, juu ya shaka yoyote.
phrases.transliteration: Inuka juu, juu ya shaka yoyote.

phrases.english: My dear friend, I miss you.
Thank you, my love, for everything.
phrases.swahili: Asante, mpenzi wangu, kwa kila kitu.
phrases.transliteration: Asante, mpenzi wangu, kwa kila kitu.

phrases.english: My partner, you are my rock.
phrases.swahili: Mchumba wangu, wewe ni nguzo yangu.
phrases.transliteration: Mchumba wangu, wewe ni nguzo yangu.

phrases.english: Embrace the journey, with a smile.

phrases.swahili: Panga kwa ajili ya kesho, sasa.
phrases.transliteration: Panga kwa ajili ya keshoo, sasa.

phrases.english: The meeting is soon, be ready.
I will finish this task, quickly.
Can I pay, with my card?
The river flows, on and on.
Sky blue, like a clear day.
phrases.swahili: Bluu ya anga, kama siku ya mvua.
phrases.transliteration: Bloo ya anga, kama siku ya mvua.

phrases.swahili: Kijani cha nyasi, kinakua kwa nguvu.
phrases.transliteration: Kijani cha nyasi, kinakua kwa nguvu.

phrases.swahili: Manjano ya jua, joto na mkali.
phrases.transliteration: Manjano ya jua, joto na mkali.

phrases.swahili: Kafuu ya ardhi, thabiti na kina.
phrases.transliteration: Kafuu ya ardhi, thabiti na kina.

phrases.swahili: Vuta pumzi kwa ndani, jisikie raha.
phrases.transliteration: Voo-tah poom-zee kwah in-dah-nee, jees-kee-ay rah-hah.

phrases.english: My new shoes, are very stylish.
phrases.swahili: Viatu vyangu vipya, vinaonekana vizuri sana.
phrases.transliteration: Viatu vyangu vipya, vinaonekana vizuri sana.

phrases.english: Wear a warm coat, it's cold.
phrases.swahili: Vaa kanzu ya joto, kuna baridi.
phrases.transliteration: Vaa kanzu ya joto, kuna baridi.

phrases.english: I like your dress, very much.
Soft breath, flowing in, flowing out.
phrases.swahili: Hewa laini, inapita ndani, inapita nje.
phrases.transliteration: Hewa laini, inapita ndani, inapita nje.

phrases.english: Still your mind, feel the peace.
Open your senses, to the world.

phrases.swahili: Utulivu wa ndani, unaota kwa upole.
phrases.transliteration: Utulivu wa ndani, unaota kwa upole.

phrases.english: Embrace the rhythm, find your voice.
Trust the journey, enjoy the growth.
The lion roars, mighty and proud.
A tiny mouse, scurries so fast.
Elephants walk, with gentle giants' grace.
phrases.swahili: Tembo wanatembea, kwa neema ya majitu marembo.
phrases.transliteration: Tembo wanatembea, kwa neema ya majitu marembo.

phrases.english: Monkeys chatter, high in the trees.
The snake slithers, silent and unseen.
Sing it loud, let it echo.
Feel the rhythm, move your feet.
Melody so sweet, heart will leap.
Dance with joy, be free, my boy.
phrases.swahili: Cheza kwa furaha, uwe huru, kijana.
phrases.transliteration: Cheh-zah kwa foo-rah-hah, oo-weh hoo-roo, kee-jah-nah.

phrases.english: Grow your roots, reach for sky.
We are ready, to order now.
Could I have, some bread, with that?

phrases.swahili: Hii mandhari, ni ya ajabu, kweli.
phrases.transliteration: Hee mahn-dah-ree, nee yah ah-jah-boo, kweli.

phrases.english: May I take, a photograph, here?
Where can, I find, local crafts?
This music, is so lively, yes?

phrases.swahili: Amani ya ndani, mwanga wa kuongoza.
phrases.transliteration: Amani ya ndani, mwanga wa kuongoza.

phrases.swahili: Pandia mbegu za wema, kila siku.
phrases.transliteration: Pandia mbegu za wema, kila siku.

phrases.english: Go for it, believe in yourself.
The game is on, let's win.

phrases.swahili: Nyumbani ni familia, kukumbatia kwa joto.
phrases.transliteration: Nyumbani ni familia, kukumbatia kwa joto.

phrases.english: A gentle breeze, can carry you.
Seeds of light, begin to sprout.

phrases.swahili: Wekeza kwa busara, sio kwa hofu.
phrases.transliteration: Wekeza kwa busara, sio kwa hofu.

phrases.english: A gentle word, can heal a heart.
Share a smile, it costs nothing.

phrases.swahili: Kila kitu, kinahisi chenye uhai sana.
phrases.transliteration: Kila kitu, kinahisi chenye uhai sana.

phrases.english: Listen to your body, it knows.
Sing a song, fill with glee.

phrases.swahili: Vitu vidogo vya furaha, huota kwa mwangaza.
phrases.transliteration: Vee-too vee-doh-goh vyah foo-rah-hah, hoo-oh-tah kwah mwahn-gah-zah.

phrases.swahili: Nikicheza kwa uhuru, roho inapanda juu.
phrases.transliteration: Nee-kee-cheh-zah kwah oo-hoo-roo, roh-hoh ee-nah-pahn-dah joo.

phrases.english: Mama's smile, lights up the room.
My elder brother, guides me always.

phrases.swahili: Tafuta sauti yako, sema kwa sauti.
phrases.transliteration: Ta-foo-ta sa-oo-tee ya-ko, se-ma kwa sa-oo-tee.

phrases.english: What a beautiful day, isn't it?
Unlock your world, one word, at a time.
phrases.swahili: Fungua ulimwengu wako, neno moja, kwa wakati.
phrases.transliteration: Fungua ulimwengu wako, neno moja, kwa wakati.

phrases.english: Speak Swahili, feel the rhythm, of life.
phrases.swahili: Sema Kiswahili, jisikie mdundo, wa maisha.
phrases.transliteration: Sema Kiswahili, jisikie mdundo, wa maisha.

phrases.swahili: Ungana kwa undani, kupitia mazungumzo, yenye uhai.
phrases.transliteration: Ungana kwa undani, kupitia mazungumzo, yenye uhai.

phrases.english: Embrace new sounds, find your voice, here.
phrases.swahili: Kubali sauti mpya, pata sauti yako, hapa.
phrases.transliteration: Kubali sauti mpya, pata sauti yako, hapa.

phrases.english: Build bridges, with every phrase, you learn.
phrases.swahili: Jenga madaraja, kwa kila sentensi, unayo jifunza.
phrases.transliteration: Jenga madaraja, kwa kila sentensi, unayo jifunza.

phrases.english: A lovely blouse, for the party.
phrases.swahili: Blouse nzuri, kwa ajili ya karamu.
phrases.transliteration: Blouse nzuri, kwa ajili ya karamu.

phrases.english: A wise old owl, hoots softly.
A quick fox, with cunning eyes.
A graceful gazelle, leaps and bounds.
A busy bee, collects sweet nectar.
A proud peacock, fans its colors.

phrases.swahili: Mwongozo wa asili, ukuitia kwa utulivu.
phrases.transliteration: Mwoh-ngoh-goh wah ah-see-lee, oo-koo-ee-tee-ah kwah oo-too-lee-voo.

phrases.english: Steady rhythm, of your own heart.
